arts.ttl: Aston Villa remain in ‘positive’ talks to sign PSG’s Marco Asensio
arts.sum: Aston Villa and Paris Saint-Germain are locked in positive talks over the transfer of Spain international Marco Asensio (29), according to a report from L’Équipe. As reported at the start of…

arts.ttl: PSG pursuing summer move for Lille’s Lucas Chevalier
arts.sum: PSG will pursue a summer move for Lille goalkeeper Lucas Chevalier (23), L’Equipe can reveal this Friday. Les Parisiens have reportedly already informed all the involved parties that the France…

arts.ttl: USWNT's Crystal Dunn joins PSG after Gotham departure
arts.sum: United States women's national team defender Crystal Dunn has joined Paris Saint-Germain on a free transfer, the club has announced . "I'm very happy to be joining Paris Saint-Germain, an ambitious club with an incredible city," Dunn said in a statement.

arts.ttl: FULL DRAW | PSG draw Brest, Monaco to face Benfica in Champions League
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain, Stade Brestois, and AS Monaco have discovered their opponents for the play-off round of the UEFA Champions League. PSG, having finished the league phase with back-to-back wins, were…

arts.ttl: Champions League 2024/25 knockout play-off draw: Man City, Real Madrid & PSG learn opponents
arts.sum: The full knockout play-off draw for the 2024/25 Champions League season.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer news: Joao Felix, Marco Asensio interest confirmed by Monchi
arts.sum: Aston Villa's president of football operations Monchi confirms that the Premier League club are interested in signing Chelsea's Joao Felix and Paris Saint-Germain's Marco Asensio.

arts.ttl: Newcastle, Wolves’ €25M-Rated Target on Aston Villa Shortlist Amid PSG Doubt
arts.sum: With the January transfer window open, Paris Saint-Germain has a chance to offload players who no longer fit into their plans—Marco Asensio being one of them. Since November 30, Asensio’s role has diminished significantly. The former Real Madrid star has lost his place in the starting lineup and has barely featured off the bench. arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours: Evan Ferguson to Everton, Kaoru Mitoma to Al-Nassr, Marco Asensio to Aston Villa
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Evan Ferguson to Everton, Kaoru Mitoma to Al-Nassr and Marco Asensio to Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Man City Eye €80M-Rated Man Utd Target for Summer Move After PSG Sale
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain took a short-term approach by loaning Xavi Simons to RB Leipzig for another season, but the uncertainty about his future has now been resolved, with the German club securing him for the long term. Back in September, Christian Falk reported that Manchester City and Liverpool were closely following Simons’ situation. arts.ttl: Wolves on Alert as Aston Villa Could Pursue €70M-Rated Arsenal, PSG Target as Jhon Durán Replacement
arts.sum: Matheus Cunha has quickly become one of Wolverhampton Wanderers’ key players, showcasing his versatility in various attacking roles. Whether as an attacking midfielder, supporting striker, or center-forward, the Brazilian has seamlessly adapted to whatever position he’s asked to play.
